title: Piel en Armonia | Medical dermatology in Quito
description: Medical dermatology in Quito with careful diagnosis, well-chosen treatment, and follow-up that makes sense from the first consultation.

slides.title: A clear diagnosis changes everything that follows.
slides.description: We listen carefully, examine the skin, and explain what needs attention first.

slides.title: Treatment starts only when it truly helps.
slides.description: Laser, peels, and injectables are chosen for safety, skin type, and goals you can sustain.

slides.title: Telemedicine helps you start without losing time.
slides.description: When the case allows it, first guidance can happen remotely and clinic review follows only if needed.

slides.title: Follow-up protects the progress you have made.
slides.description: Each review checks visible change and adjusts the plan before small issues grow again.

slides.title: A serious team can still feel close.
slides.description: You get careful explanations, honest timing, and decisions that never hide behind jargon.

newsStrip.label: Web booking
newsStrip.headline: Online booking is paused for now; services and telemedicine remain open so care can keep moving.
newsStrip.detail: While online booking returns, you can start with telemedicine or open the consultation path that best organizes your case today.

editorial.title: What matters is understanding the next step clearly.
editorial.deck: Each block sums up what we usually see, how we approach it, and what follow-up often makes sense.

cards.title: The first visit brings the picture together
cards.copy: When something changes in the skin, we begin with a full evaluation and a plan that feels understandable.

cards.title: Acne and rosacea without the noise
cards.copy: The goal is calmer skin, fewer relapses, and timely adjustments based on how your skin responds.

cards.title: Laser explained before it is offered
cards.copy: Before technology enters, we review skin type, goal, and recovery so the decision stays grounded.

cards.title: Telemedicine when it truly speeds care
cards.copy: It works well for early guidance and for deciding whether clinic review should happen soon.

cards.title: Pediatrics that also supports the family
cards.copy: Instructions are translated into simple steps for home, school, and follow-up routines.

cards.title: Follow-up you can see from visit to visit
cards.copy: We compare symptoms, images, and tolerance so treatment changes stay thoughtful, not improvised.

corporateMatrix.title: Care built around the questions people actually bring
corporateMatrix.deck: Each card explains who a service may help, what is reviewed, and what the next useful step tends to be.

cards.title: The consultation that brings order
cards.copy: A first evaluation designed to leave you with clear priorities and a realistic plan.

cards.title: A plan for acne and rosacea
cards.copy: Medical care to calm flares, protect the skin, and hold onto improvement.

cards.title: Laser with thoughtful settings
cards.copy: Parameters are reviewed carefully before every session, with clear aftercare afterwards.

cards.title: Lesions worth checking soon
cards.copy: For moles or spots that change and should be looked at without waiting too long.

cards.title: Remote first guidance
cards.copy: A useful way to begin and decide whether remote care is enough or clinic review is better.

cards.title: Support for texture and firmness
cards.copy: Medical options built around gradual, natural changes that are easy to explain honestly.

bookingStatus.title: Online booking under maintenance
bookingStatus.description: While web booking returns, you can start through services or ask for first guidance through telemedicine.
